# Email Design Rules — Annual Reports CRM

**Purpose:** Mandatory design rules for all HTML emails generated by this system.
**Applies to:** WF[02] office email, WF[03] client email, WF[04] edit notification, future reminders.
**Source:** [SUB] Document Service "Generate HTML" node + WF[04] "Build Edit Email" node.

---

## 1. Layout

- **Max width:** 600px centered. Use `<table>` wrapper, never flexbox/grid.
- **All layout via `<table>`:** Gmail and Outlook ignore flexbox/grid entirely.
- **Single column only:** Best for RTL, mobile, and data-heavy content.
- **Wrapper pattern:** Outer table (100% width, bg color) → Inner table (600px centered) → Content rows.
- **All CSS must be inline:** Gmail strips `<style>` blocks. Every element gets its own `style=""`.
- **Use HTML attributes as fallbacks:** `align="center"`, `width="600"`, `bgcolor="#ffffff"` alongside CSS.

```html
<!-- Standard email wrapper -->
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" bgcolor="#f7f8fa">
  <tr>
    <td align="center" style="padding: 32px 16px;">
      <table role="presentation" width="600" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
             bgcolor="#ffffff" style="max-width:600px; border-radius:8px;">
        <tr><td style="padding: 32px;">
          <!-- Content here -->
        </td></tr>
      </table>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
```

---

## 2. Typography

### Font Stack
```css
font-family: Calibri, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
```
Calibri renders Hebrew cleanly with consistent bold/normal rendering. Falls back to system fonts on Mac/iOS.

### Type Scale
| Element | Size | Weight | Line-height |
|---------|------|--------|-------------|
| Email title (H1) | 22px | bold | 1.3 |
| Section header (H2) | 18px | bold | 1.4 |
| Category header (H3) | 16px | bold | 1.5 |
| Body / doc names | 15px | normal | 1.5 (Hebrew: 1.6) |
| Questionnaire labels | 14px | bold | 1.6 |
| Questionnaire values | 14px | normal | 1.6 |
| Meta / footer | 13px | normal | 1.5 |
| Button text | 16px | bold | 1.0 |

**Only two weights:** `normal` (400) and `bold` (700). No intermediate weights (500, 600) — they cause inconsistent rendering across email clients.

### Rules
- **Never below 13px** — mobile clients auto-resize, breaking layout.
- **Hebrew line-height: 1.6** — Hebrew chars are taller than Latin.
- **No italics for Hebrew** — makes already-cursive-leaning text hard to read.
- **Bold for dynamic values:** employer names, bank names, amounts (SSOT rule).
- **Max ~50 Hebrew chars per line** for readability (Hebrew chars are wider than Latin).

---

## 3. Color Palette

### Text
| Use | Color | Note |
|-----|-------|------|
| Headings / primary | `#1a1a1a` | Near-black, not pure `#000` |
| Body text | `#374151` | Warm dark gray |
| Secondary / meta | `#6b7280` | Medium gray |
| Muted / footer | `#9ca3af` | Light gray |

### Backgrounds
| Use | Color |
|-----|-------|
| Email outer bg | `#f7f8fa` |
| Content card bg | `#ffffff` |
| Alternating rows / secondary | `#f9fafb` |
| Summary box | `#f0f4f8` |

### Accent
| Use | Color |
|-----|-------|
| Primary brand / links | `#2563eb` |
| Section header accent | `#1e40af` |
| Category header (subtle) | `#374151` (not orange/yellow) |

### Status Indicators (always pair with icon — never color alone)
| Status | Background | Text | Icon |
|--------|-----------|------|------|
| Received/Complete | `#d1fae5` | `#065f46` | ✓ |
| Missing/Required | `#fee2e2` | `#991b1b` | ⚠ |
| Needs Fix | `#fef3c7` | `#92400e` | ⚡ |
| Waived | `#f3f4f6` | `#6b7280` | — |
| In Review | `#dbeafe` | `#1e40af` | 👁 |

### Section Differentiation (married couples)
| Section | Accent Color | Light Tint |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| Client docs | `#2563eb` (blue) | `#eff6ff` |
| Spouse docs | `#7c3aed` (purple) | `#f5f3ff` |

---

## 4. Spacing (8px Grid)

| Token | Value | Use |
|-------|-------|-----|
| XS | 4px | Between related inline elements |
| S | 8px | Inside badges, between list items |
| M | 16px | Standard paragraph/section gap |
| L | 24px | Between category groups |
| XL | 32px | Between major sections, card padding |
| XXL | 48px | Before/after CTA blocks |

### Implementation Rules
- **Use `padding` on `<td>`, not `margin`** — Outlook.com drops `margin`.
- **Avoid CSS shorthand** — Use `padding-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 16px;` not `padding: 16px 0;` (Outlook bug).
- **Spacer rows for guaranteed space:**
  ```html
  <tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-bottom:0; font-size:1px; line-height:1px;">&nbsp;</td></tr>
  ```
- **Horizontal dividers:**
  ```html
  <tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-bottom:24px;">
    <div style="border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb; font-size:1px; line-height:1px;">&nbsp;</div>
  </td></tr>
  ```

---

## 5. Buttons / CTAs

### Hierarchy
| Button | Style | Color |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Primary (Approve) | Solid filled | `#059669` (green) |
| Secondary (Edit) | Bordered outline | `#2563eb` border, white bg |
| Tertiary (Link) | Text underline | `#2563eb` |

### Rules
- **Min height:** 48px (via `line-height:48px`).
- **Min width:** 200px for primary CTAs.
- **Border-radius:** 8px (ignored by Outlook, but graceful).
- **Spacing between buttons:** 16px gap.
- **Place buttons ABOVE document list** — the office user's primary action (approve/edit) should be visible without scrolling.
- **Full-width on mobile** where media queries are supported.

### Bulletproof Button Template
```html
<table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" align="center">
  <tr>
    <td align="center" bgcolor="#059669"
        style="border-radius:8px; background-color:#059669;">
      <a href="URL" target="_blank"
         style="background-color:#059669; border-radius:8px; color:#ffffff;
                display:inline-block; font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:16px;
                font-weight:bold; line-height:48px; text-align:center;
                text-decoration:none; width:240px; -webkit-text-size-adjust:none;">
        ✅ אישור ושליחה ללקוח
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
```

---

## 6. RTL / Hebrew

- **Set `dir="rtl"` on outermost container** for Hebrew-only emails.
- **Bilingual emails:** Set `dir` per section, NOT globally.
  ```html
  <table dir="ltr"><!-- English section --></table>
  <table dir="rtl"><!-- Hebrew section --></table>
  ```
- **Always add both `dir` and CSS:** `dir="rtl" style="direction:rtl; text-align:right;"` — some clients respect only one.
- **Numbers in `<span dir="ltr">`:** Dates, phone numbers, amounts — wrap in LTR span.
- **Border indicators on right edge** (leading edge in RTL): `border-right: 4px solid #2563eb;`
- **Subject line must start with Hebrew char** — not emoji, not English — to prevent RTL reversal.
- **Mixed-direction content:** Wrap English terms in `<span dir="ltr">` within Hebrew text.

---

## 7. Information Hierarchy (Email Structure)

### Office Email (WF[02]) — Top to Bottom
```
[0] LOGO — Centered, 180px, grey bg (#f7f8fa)

[1] HEADER — Title: "📋 שאלון שנתי התקבל - {name} - {year}"

[2] SUMMARY BOX — Client info card:
    Client name, spouse, year, email, phone, doc count

[3] ACTION BUTTONS — Approve + Edit (above the fold!)

[4] QUESTIONNAIRE TABLE — Zebra-striped key-value table
    Alternating: white / #f9fafb
    Font: 14px, compact

[5] DOCUMENT LIST — Grouped by category, separated by person
    [5a] Client section (blue accent)
         Category → Documents (sorted by type, then name)
    [5b] Spouse section (purple accent, if married)

[6] FOOTER — Airtable link, firm name (minimal)
```

### Client Email (WF[03])

#### Hebrew-Only (default)
```
[0] LOGO — Centered, 180px, grey bg (#f7f8fa)
[1] GREETING — "שלום {name},"
[2] INTRO — "להלן רשימת {count} המסמכים הנדרשים להכנת הדו״ח לשנת המס {year}:"
[3] DOCUMENT LIST — Grouped by category (no questionnaire, no buttons)
[4] CLIENT QUESTIONS — (DL-127) Amber card, only if unanswered questions exist
[5] CTA+HELP BLOCK — (DL-127) Merged light blue box: send-docs CTA + help info
[6] FOOTER — Firm name (RTL)
```

#### Bilingual (English speakers) — Card Layout (see Section 11)
```
[0] LOGO — Centered, 180px, grey bg (#f7f8fa)
[1] BLUE HEADER BAR — "Required Documents - {name} - {year}" (LTR)
[2] EN CARD — greeting, doc list, CLIENT QUESTIONS, CTA+HELP BLOCK (white bg, bordered)
[3] 16px SPACER
[4] HE CARD — greeting, doc list, CLIENT QUESTIONS, CTA+HELP BLOCK (#f9fafb bg, bordered)
[5] BILINGUAL FOOTER — centered, firm name EN/HE + email
```

### Edit Notification (WF[04])
```
[1] HEADER — "🔄 עדכון רשימת מסמכים - {name} - {year}"

[2] SUMMARY BOX — Client info + total remaining docs

[3] CHANGES SUMMARY — Color-coded sections:
    ❌ Removed (red) → 🔄 Restored (blue) → ➕ Added (green)
    → 🔀 Status changes (purple) → 📝 Notes (teal)

[4] ACTION BUTTONS — Approve + Edit

[5] UPDATED DOCUMENT LIST — Full current list

[6] FOOTER — Airtable link
```

---

## 8. Document List Rendering

### Category Group
```html
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin-bottom:20px;">
  <!-- Category header -->
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:8px 0; font-size:16px; font-weight:600; color:#374151;
               border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">
      {emoji} {categoryName}
    </td>
  </tr>
  <!-- Document items -->
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:6px 16px; font-size:15px; color:#374151;">
      {documentTitle}
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
```

### Rules
- **Sort within categories:** By `type` (template_id numeric part), then by `issuer_name` alphabetically.
- **Person separation:** Blue header + light blue tint for client, purple + light purple for spouse.
- **32px gap** between client and spouse sections.
- **Category emoji as visual anchor** — renders natively in all email clients.
- **No nested `<ul>/<li>`** — use table rows for better Outlook compatibility.

---

## 9. Email Client Compatibility Cheat Sheet

### Safe Everywhere
✅ `background-color`, `color`, `font-family`, `font-size`, `font-weight`
✅ `line-height`, `text-align`, `padding` (on `<td>`), `border`, `direction`
✅ Inline styles, `<table>` layout, HTML attributes (`align`, `width`, `bgcolor`)

### Partially Safe
⚠️ `border-radius` — works except Outlook desktop
⚠️ `max-width` — ignored by Gmail/Outlook desktop (use MSO conditional)

### Avoid
❌ `margin` — dropped by Outlook.com
❌ `flexbox`, `grid` — zero support in Gmail/Outlook
❌ `<style>` blocks — stripped by Gmail
❌ CSS shorthand — buggy in Outlook
❌ `box-shadow` — only Apple Mail
❌ `@media` queries — not in Gmail

---

## 10. Dark Mode

- Use **near-black (`#1a1a1a`) and off-white (`#f7f8fa`)** — not pure black/white.
- Status badge colors maintain readability when inverted.
- Avoid transparent PNGs on white backgrounds.
- Add meta tags when supported:
  ```html
  <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
  ```

---

## 11. Bilingual Card Layout

**Standard pattern for all bilingual (EN+HE) emails.** Used in WF[03] client email and future bilingual emails.

### Structure
```
[1] BLUE HEADER BAR — LTR, EN subject, #eff6ff bg, 3px solid #2563eb bottom border
[2] ENGLISH CARD — white bg, 1px solid #e5e7eb border, border-radius 8px
    Language tag: "🔤 English" (12px, muted)
    Greeting → Body → Doc list → Instructions
[3] 16px SPACER
[4] HEBREW CARD — #f9fafb bg, same border/radius
    Language tag: "🔤 עברית" (12px, muted)
    Greeting → Body → Doc list → Instructions
[5] BILINGUAL FOOTER — centered, border-top 1px solid #e5e7eb
    "Moshe Atsits CPA Firm / משרד רו״ח Client Name | reports@moshe-atsits.co.il"
```

### Rules
- Each card is a bordered `<table>` with `border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px;`
- EN card: `background-color:#ffffff` — HE card: `background-color:#f9fafb`
- Language tags (🔤) at 12px, `color:#9ca3af`, top of each card
- Set `dir` + CSS `direction` + `text-align` per card — NOT globally
- Cards sit inside 32px side padding of the 600px container
- No `wrapEmail()` — the card layout builds its own full outer structure
- Logo row above header bar with grey bg (`#f7f8fa`) — header bar uses `border-radius:0` (logo is now topmost)

### HTML Template Snippet
```html
<!-- Outer wrapper (no dir — bilingual) -->
<table width="100%" bgcolor="#f7f8fa">
  <tr><td align="center" style="padding:32px 16px;">
    <table width="600" bgcolor="#ffffff" style="max-width:600px; border-radius:8px;">

      <!-- Logo row -->
      <tr><td align="center" bgcolor="#f7f8fa" style="background-color:#f7f8fa;padding:24px 0 16px;">
        <img src="https://liozshor.github.io/annual-reports-client-portal/assets/images/logo-email.png"
             alt="Moshe Atsits" width="180" height="auto"
             style="display:block;border:0;max-width:180px;height:auto;" />
      </td></tr>

      <!-- Blue header bar -->
      <tr><td style="padding:24px 32px; background-color:#eff6ff;
                     border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb; border-radius:0;" dir="ltr">
        <h1 style="font-size:22px; color:#2563eb;">Required Documents - {name} - {year}</h1>
      </td></tr>

      <!-- EN card -->
      <tr><td style="padding:24px 32px 0;">
        <table width="100%" style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; background:#fff;">
          <tr><td style="padding:24px;" dir="ltr">
            🔤 English · Greeting · Body · Doc list · Instructions
          </td></tr>
        </table>
      </td></tr>

      <!-- 16px spacer -->
      <tr><td style="padding-top:16px;">&nbsp;</td></tr>

      <!-- HE card -->
      <tr><td style="padding:0 32px 24px;">
        <table width="100%" style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; background:#f9fafb;">
          <tr><td style="padding:24px;" dir="rtl">
            🔤 עברית · Greeting · Body · Doc list · Instructions
          </td></tr>
        </table>
      </td></tr>

      <!-- Bilingual footer -->
      <tr><td style="padding:24px 32px; border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb; text-align:center;">
        Moshe Atsits CPA Firm / משרד רו״ח Client Name | reports@moshe-atsits.co.il
      </td></tr>

    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
```

---

## 12. Standard Shared Components (FROZEN)

**Every email** must include a logo row, blue header bar, and standard footer. These are the canonical HTML blocks — copy exactly, changing only `{subject}` / `{dir}` / `{align}`.

### Logo Row (DL-186)
```html
<!-- Logo row — inside 600px container, BEFORE blue header bar -->
<tr><td align="center" bgcolor="#f7f8fa" style="background-color:#f7f8fa;padding:24px 0 16px;">
  <img src="https://liozshor.github.io/annual-reports-client-portal/assets/images/logo-email.png"
       alt="Moshe Atsits" width="180" height="auto"
       style="display:block;border:0;max-width:180px;height:auto;" />
</td></tr>
```
**Rules:** Grey bg (`#f7f8fa`) matches outer email background — NOT white card bg. Logo sits between card top and header bar.

### Blue Header Bar — HE-only emails
```html
<!-- Blue header bar (HE) — inside 600px container, AFTER logo row -->
<tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-right:32px; padding-bottom:24px; padding-left:32px; background-color:#eff6ff; border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb; border-radius:0;" dir="rtl">
  <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
    <tr><td style="font-size:22px; font-weight:bold; color:#2563eb; line-height:1.3; font-family:Calibri, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; direction:rtl; text-align:right;">
      {subject}
    </td></tr>
  </table>
</td></tr>
```

### Blue Header Bar — Bilingual / LTR emails
```html
<!-- Blue header bar (EN/bilingual) — inside 600px container, AFTER logo row -->
<tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-right:32px; padding-bottom:24px; padding-left:32px; background-color:#eff6ff; border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb; border-radius:0;" dir="ltr">
  <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
    <tr><td style="font-size:22px; font-weight:bold; color:#2563eb; line-height:1.3; font-family:Calibri, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; direction:ltr; text-align:left;">
      {subject}
    </td></tr>
  </table>
</td></tr>
```

### Standard Footer — HE-only emails
```html
<!-- Standard footer (HE) — inside 600px container, LAST row -->
<tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-right:32px; padding-bottom:24px; padding-left:32px; border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;">
  <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
    <tr><td align="center" style="font-size:13px; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.5; font-family:Calibri, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;">
      משרד רו״ח Client Name | reports@moshe-atsits.co.il
    </td></tr>
  </table>
</td></tr>
```

### Standard Footer — Bilingual emails
```html
<!-- Standard footer (bilingual) — inside 600px container, LAST row -->
<tr><td style="padding-top:24px; padding-right:32px; padding-bottom:24px; padding-left:32px; border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;">
  <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
    <tr><td align="center" style="font-size:13px; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.5; font-family:Calibri, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;">
      Moshe Atsits CPA Firm / משרד רו״ח Client Name | reports@moshe-atsits.co.il
    </td></tr>
  </table>
</td></tr>
```

### CTA + Help Merged Block (DL-127)
Replaces the old separate `sendDocsBox()` + `contactBlock()`. All client-facing emails now use this single merged block.

```html
<!-- CTA + Help merged block — light blue container -->
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:24px;">
  <tr><td style="background-color:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius:8px;
                 padding:20px 24px; direction:{dir}; text-align:{align};">
    <!-- CTA section -->
    <p style="margin:0 0 8px; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#1e40af;">{ctaText}</p>
    <a href="mailto:reports@moshe-atsits.co.il" style="font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; color:#2563eb; text-decoration:none;">reports@moshe-atsits.co.il</a>
    <!-- Dashed divider -->
    <div style="border-top:1px dashed #bfdbfe; margin-top:16px; padding-top:14px;">
      <!-- Help section (muted, 13px) -->
      ► {helpLabel}
      ☎ 03-6390820 | 077-9928421
      ✉ natan@moshe-atsits.co.il  WhatsApp
    </div>
  </td></tr>
</table>
```

**Rules:**
- CTA text: 16px bold `#1e40af` · Email address: 20px bold `#2563eb` mailto link
- Help section: 13px `#6b7280` (muted gray) — subtle, not competing with CTA
- Dashed divider: 1px dashed `#bfdbfe` — separates CTA from help visually
- WhatsApp icon: 16×16, inline with Natan email on same line
- **Batch status variant:** CTA text says "Send corrected documents here :)" instead of "Send your documents here :)"

### Client Questions Block (DL-127)
Injected via `<!-- CLIENT_QUESTIONS -->` placeholder by WF[03] "Inject Questions" node. Appears between doc list and CTA block when unanswered questions exist.

```html
<!-- Amber questions card -->
<table width="100%" style="margin:24px 0;">
  <tr><td style="background:#FEF3C7; border:1px solid #F59E0B; border-radius:8px; padding:20px;">
    ❓ שאלות מהמשרד (16px bold #92400E)
    אנא השב/י על השאלות... (14px #78350F)
    1. Question text... (14px #92400E, border-bottom #FDE68A)
  </td></tr>
</table>
```

### Exceptions
| Email | Header Bar | Footer | Notes |
|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| WF[01] Send Questionnaire | N/A (exempt) | N/A (exempt) | User likes current design — font fix only |
| Type A Reminder | Solid blue bar (own design) | Standard HE footer | Keep existing solid header |
| Type B Reminder | Tone-colored header (own design) | Standard HE footer | Keep existing colored header |

---

## Quick Reference — What NOT to Do

| Anti-pattern | Why | Do Instead |
|-------------|-----|------------|
| Pure `#000000` text | Harsh, bad dark mode | `#1a1a1a` |
| Orange/yellow category headers | Looks like warnings | `#374151` with emoji |
| `margin` for spacing | Outlook.com drops it | `padding` on `<td>` |
| CSS shorthand `padding: 16px 0` | Outlook rendering bug | `padding-top:16px; padding-bottom:16px;` |
| Flexbox/grid layout | Zero email support | `<table>` |
| `<style>` block | Gmail strips it | Inline styles |
| Color-only status indicators | Accessibility fail | Color + icon + text |
| Buttons below document list | Buried below fold | Buttons above content |
| Italic Hebrew text | Hard to read | Bold or regular only |
| Emoji-first email subjects | RTL reversal | Hebrew char first |
